name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: entry missing url field rejected
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: my-source
  name: My Source
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-standards-urls.sh" "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml"
